purpose: Turn observed intent or object mismatches into balanced live-agent regressions without a resident gate or routine user questions.

profiles.smoke: Fast representative checks for ordinary productivity, topology, ambiguity, worker routing, and preference learning.
profiles.core: The normal regression bank for stable behavior changes.
profiles.deep: Every live Codex case, used after material instruction, router, memory, skill, or topology changes.

learning_loop.input: one evidenced failure or stable user correction with provenance
learning_loop.candidate: validated candidate record under the D-drive inbox; never authority or automatic policy
learning_loop.fixture: balanced positive, regression, explicit-authority, and prohibited-side-effect cases
learning_loop.candidate_change: one prompt, instruction, router, skill, memory pointer, or thin adapter delta at a time
learning_loop.promotion: affected live cases and prohibited-side-effect cases pass with real app-server traces
learning_loop.production_feedback: new external signals become candidates; only verified outcomes graduate into regression cases

mature_basis.source: Promptfoo external tests and metadata filters
mature_basis.use: external case files, metadata domains, and selective local runs
mine real failures, keep scoped balanced tests, automate scoring, and calibrate with humans
graduate observed failures into a near-100-percent regression bank
version-controlled human-readable datasets with schema discipline
retain a source trace reference when a real failure becomes a candidate; no Langfuse platform required
scope child failure and recovery without granting a child authority over its supervisor
contain a dependency failure so unrelated pools and functions continue

mature_basis.source: Envoy outlier detection and priority routing
mature_basis.use: remove unhealthy candidates from the load-balancing set and later re-admit them
cool down repeatedly failing endpoints and use bounded recovery probes
